title: Bee Removal in Cortlandt, Westchester | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Cortlandt, Westchester. Safe, humane bee hive extraction for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$550 bee removal.
intro: Dealing with a bee infestation in Cortlandt? Best Pest Control NYC provides professional bee removal services throughout Westchester County, protecting your property while ensuring the safe, humane relocation of bee colonies. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges Cortlandt homeowners face, from properties near the Hudson River to suburban neighborhoods.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Cortlandt and greater Westchester with fast, reliable bee removal services. Our licensed professionals use eco-friendly methods to safely remove bees without harm to your family, pets, or the environment, all at transparent pricing between $350-$550.
localContext: Cortlandt's mix of historic homes, modern developments near Bear Mountain, and wooded properties around Blue Mountain Reservation create ideal conditions for bee colonies to establish hives in attics, walls, and outdoor structures. Our team is familiar with the area's architectural styles and common bee nesting sites throughout the community.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Cortlandt?
faqs.answer: Bee removal services in Cortlandt typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the hive location, size, and accessibility. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees before starting any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove bees from my Cortlandt property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day bee removal services throughout Cortlandt and Westchester County. Once you call, we'll schedule an inspection quickly and can often complete removal within 24-48 hours depending on the complexity of the situation.

faqs.question: Do you kill the bees or relocate them?
faqs.answer: We prioritize humane bee relocation whenever possible. Our experts safely extract the hive and relocate the colony to a suitable environment where they can thrive without posing a risk to your property, supporting local ecosystems and pollinator populations.

faqs.question: What types of bees do you remove in Cortlandt?
faqs.answer: We remove all bee species common to Westchester County, including honey bees, carpenter bees, and bumble bees. Our technicians are trained to identify the species and use appropriate removal techniques for each type, ensuring complete elimination from your property.
